scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event loop blocking; 200 webhooks/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained; async parsing recommended; early-response + failure inconsistency noted as a separate Critical finding (unhandled errors after 200 ACK); idempotency concern noted in suggestions; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: parseXmlSync correctly identified as Critical with detailed explanation of event loop blocking under load
Excellent reproduction steps provided for the sync parsing issue
Early 200 ACK issue elevated to Critical with thorough analysis of unhandled promise rejection consequences
Race condition on concurrent updates identified as an additional high-severity finding beyond the rubric expectations
Idempotency concern noted in suggestions section
DeliveryMap logic issue identified as an additional important finding showing deep code comprehension
Async parsing fix clearly recommended with concrete alternatives (streaming parser, worker threads)
